name: Progress MS-34 (95P)
description: Progress resupply mission to the International Space Station.
program_description: The International Space Station programme is tied together by a complex set of legal, political and financial agreements between the sixteen nations involved in the project, governing ownership of the various components, rights to crewing and utilization, and responsibilities for crew rotation and resupply of the International Space Station. rocket_fact: Liquid Hydrogen fuel is so cold (-423°F) that it would instantly freeze air into a solid block of nitrogen ice.
